acceptance_targets: [ch11_booker_01] In the revised closing span anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:492 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:506, the reader learns one new external stake datum from the message (caller identity plus a concrete ask/date/amount), and Eli performs a visible action in response before chapter end.

[ch11_craft_01] In the revised 331-336 span, there is no omnibus summary sentence of the conversation; both characters speak directly about family consequence, the exchange contains at least one interruption/refusal, and at least one physical beat references Eli's injury or bodily state.

[ch11_dialogue_01] In each revised exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:380 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:452, there is no run of more than one consecutive low-information confirmation line, and each character has at least one line whose syntax/diction is clearly non-interchangeable with the other.
[ch11_prose_01] All three target lines are rewritten so none uses 'He did.' as a complete sentence, and each revised beat contributes a distinct concrete detail (sensory, emotional, or situational).

[ch11_prose_02] In the revised ground-rules section anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:380 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:402, at least two paragraphs include explicit Eli interiority (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment), and there is no uninterrupted run longer than nine paragraphs without interior access.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised closing span anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:492 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:506, the reader learns one new external stake datum from the message (caller identity plus a concrete ask/date/amount), and Eli performs a visible action in response before chapter end.
findings.problem: The ending replays avoidance without adding fresh causal consequence: after the chapter's intimacy/confession state change, Eli again defers contact (unplayed voicemail), which softens forward pressure instead of forcing a new cost-bearing choice.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the closing beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:492, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:502, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:506 so the voicemail creates immediate consequence (e.g., concrete demand/deadline from home) and Eli makes an observable response in-scene (play, delete, call back, or explicit refusal with cost).

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised 331-336 span, there is no omnibus summary sentence of the conversation; both characters speak directly about family consequence, the exchange contains at least one interruption/refusal, and at least one physical beat references Eli's injury or bodily state.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift via summary-replacing-scene: at a high-stakes post-intimacy moment, the text reports an hour of talk in aggregate ('She told him... He told her...') instead of dramatizing live friction and consequence, reducing emotional and ethical pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the summarized block anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:331, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:333, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:335 with rendered scene dialogue and embodied beats that stage at least one direct conflict point about secrecy/return obligations and one boundary reaffirmation from Marisol.

findings.acceptance_test: In each revised exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:380 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:452, there is no run of more than one consecutive low-information confirmation line, and each character has at least one line whose syntax/diction is clearly non-interchangeable with the other.
findings.problem: Two key exchanges lean on repeated confirmation turns ('Okay.' 'I know.' 'Good.') that flatten idiolect separation and drift toward transcript cadence instead of leverage-shifting dialogue.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework dialogue anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:380 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:402, plus snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:452 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:480, by replacing confirmation-only turns with character-specific diction/rhythm (Eli's self-revising logistics voice vs. Marisol's concrete boundary voice) and at least one interruption that changes leverage.

findings.acceptance_test: All three target lines are rewritten so none uses 'He did.' as a complete sentence, and each revised beat contributes a distinct concrete detail (sensory, emotional, or situational).
findings.problem: The same compressed sentence construction ('He did.') appears three times, reading as a repeated formula rather than deliberate rhythmic variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:343, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:434 to replace pronoun+auxiliary shorthand with context-specific action/sensation/thought.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised ground-rules section anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:380 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:402, at least two paragraphs include explicit Eli interiority (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment), and there is no uninterrupted run longer than nine paragraphs without interior access.
findings.problem: The ground-rules section runs 10+ consecutive short paragraphs without interior access to Eli, producing screenplay drift during a consequential boundary negotiation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Inject close-third interiority into the ground-rules run anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:380 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:402 (bodily sensation, memory, or self-assessment tied to Marisol's rules) while keeping scene tempo and conflict.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
